---
title: "Statcast pitch intro"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Load packages

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
# You can install using the pacman package using the following code:
#if (!requireNamespace('pacman', quietly = TRUE)){
#  install.packages('pacman')
#}
#pacman::p_load_current_gh("BillPetti/baseballr")
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

Find Garrett Crochet's MLB ID and load Statcast data

```{r}
crochet_id <- baseballr::playerid_lookup(last_name = "Crochet", first_name = "Garrett") %>% 
  dplyr::pull(mlbam_id)

crochet_data <- baseballr::statcast_search(
  start_date = paste0(most_recent_mlb_season(), "-01-01"),
  end_date   = Sys.Date(),
  pitcherid  = crochet_id,
  playerid = crochet_id
)
```
